description: Pharmaverse-derived raw demographics mapped to SDTM DM outputs (10 cases, including ambiguity-heavy hard cases).

cases.task_description: Convert this raw demographic record into an SDTM DM-style output with exactly these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY. Return only those six fields - no extras.
cases.study_context:
Map the raw demographic fields to the SDTM DM target variables.
- For this study, USUBJID uses the provided USUBJID_PREFIX, not the full STUDY text.
- USUBJID = USUBJID_PREFIX + '-' + SITEID_RAW + '-' + PATNUM
- AGE = integer years
- SEX = 'M' or 'F' (Male -> M, Female -> F)
- RACE = uppercase SDTM controlled terminology
- IC_DT is in DD/MM/YYYY format - day first, then month, then year
- RFSTDTC = ISO 8601 date YYYY-MM-DD converted from IC_DT
- COUNTRY = ISO 3166 alpha-3 code (e.g. 'United States' -> 'USA')

cases.task_description: Convert this raw demographic record into an SDTM DM-style output with exactly these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY. Return only those six fields - no extras.
cases.study_context:
Map the raw demographic fields to the SDTM DM target variables.
- For this study, USUBJID uses the provided USUBJID_PREFIX, not the full STUDY text.
- USUBJID = USUBJID_PREFIX + '-' + SITEID_RAW + '-' + PATNUM
- AGE = integer years
- SEX = 'M' or 'F' (Male -> M, Female -> F)
- RACE = uppercase SDTM controlled terminology
- IC_DT is in DD/MM/YYYY format - day first, then month, then year

cases.task_description: Convert this raw demographic record into an SDTM DM-style output with exactly these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY. Return only those six fields - no extras.
cases.study_context:
Map the raw demographic fields to the SDTM DM target variables.
- USUBJID = USUBJID_PREFIX + '-' + SITEID_RAW + '-' + PATNUM
- AGE = integer years
- SEX = 'M' or 'F'
- RACE must use CDISC SDTM controlled terminology. Valid values include WHITE, BLACK OR AFRICAN AMERICAN, ASIAN, AMERICAN INDIAN OR ALASKA NATIVE, OTHER, UNKNOWN.
- IC_DT is in DD/MM/YYYY format
- RFSTDTC = ISO 8601 date YYYY-MM-DD converted from IC_DT
- COUNTRY = ISO 3166 alpha-3 code

SPONSOR RACE CODING NOTE: 'Hispanic/Latin American' is ethnicity, not race. When no valid racial category is provided, map RACE to 'UNKNOWN'.

cases.task_description: Convert this raw demographic record into an SDTM DM-style output with exactly these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY. Return only those six fields - no extras.
cases.study_context:
Map the raw demographic fields to the SDTM DM target variables.
- USUBJID = USUBJID_PREFIX + '-' + SITEID_RAW + '-' + PATNUM
- AGE = integer years
- SEX = 'M' or 'F'
- RACE = uppercase CDISC SDTM controlled terminology
- RFSTDTC must be the date of first study treatment, not the informed consent date
- Both dates are supplied in DD/MM/YYYY format
- COUNTRY = ISO 3166 alpha-3 code

PROTOCOL NOTE: If informed consent and first dose dates conflict, use the treatment start date for RFSTDTC.

cases.task_description: Convert this raw demographic record into an SDTM DM-style output with exactly these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY. Return only those six fields - no extras.
cases.study_context:
Map the raw demographic fields to the SDTM DM target variables.
- USUBJID = USUBJID_PREFIX + '-' + padded SITEID_RAW + '-' + PATNUM
- SITEID_RAW must be zero-padded to 3 digits for sponsor submission identifiers
- AGE = integer years
- SEX = 'M' or 'F'
- RACE = uppercase CDISC SDTM controlled terminology
- IC_DT is in DD/MM/YYYY format
- RFSTDTC = ISO 8601 date YYYY-MM-DD converted from IC_DT
- COUNTRY may be inferred from site mapping if source country is missing

SITE MAPPING NOTE: Site 7 belongs to the Germany cluster. If COUNTRY_NAME is missing for site 7, set COUNTRY to 'DEU'.

cases.task_description: Convert this raw demographic record into an SDTM DM-style output with exactly these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY. Return only those six fields - no extras.
cases.study_context:
Map the raw demographic fields to the SDTM DM target variables.
- For this study, USUBJID uses the provided USUBJID_PREFIX, not the full STUDY text.
- USUBJID = USUBJID_PREFIX + '-' + site/investigator identifier + '-' + patient identifier
- AGE = integer years
- SEX = 'M' or 'F' (Male -> M, Female -> F)
- RACE = uppercase SDTM controlled terminology
- Consent date is in DD/MM/YYYY format
- RFSTDTC = ISO 8601 date YYYY-MM-DD converted from the consent date
- COUNTRY = ISO 3166 alpha-3 code
- Some source systems use non-standard raw field names; infer the correct mapping from meaning, not exact variable names.
